intent: Ensure future direct-main and branch-no-pr closeout includes an origin push by default.

scope.summary: Codified origin-push closeout requirements for direct-main and branch-no-pr routes, added validator coverage, and tightened the main route guard so direct-main receipt evidence must refer to a landed ref included in the pushed range.

cleanup_evidence_refs: .octon/state/evidence/validation/analysis/2026-05-04-change-lifecycle-routing-hygiene-note.md classifies unrelated untracked .octon/state/** artifacts as retained-evidence candidates requiring separate maintainer disposition.
git status -sb after safeguard commit shows only unrelated untracked .octon/state/** retained-evidence candidates.
validation_evidence_refs: .octon/framework/assurance/runtime/_ops/scripts/validate-github-main-ruleset-alignment.sh --expect target-route-neutral --ruleset-json .octon/state/evidence/control/execution/github-rulesets/2026-05-04-route-neutral-main-migration/post-migration-main-effective-branch-rules.json after safeguard patch: pass, errors=0.

review_waiver_refs: Operator explicitly instructed that future direct-main or branch-no-pr closeout must include a push to origin.
No PR metadata was created or used for this direct-main safeguard Change.

rollback_handle.instructions: Revert commit ec506f5869f3347d658976f87b6d980463fd92d5 on main if the no-PR closeout push safeguard needs rollback. Do not reset published main without explicit operator approval.
